f . g = traverseMaybeMissing $ \ k x -> missingKey g k x >>= \y -> case y of Nothing -> pure Nothing Just q -> missingKey f k q

entities.name: Applicative
entities.signature: instance Monad f => Applicative (WhenMissing f k x)
